meaning: n.[解]前脑,壮年人发达的脑部
examples: Its control center is based in the forebrain, and it regulates breathing for use in speech, singing, sighing, and so on.
The forebrain is the largest and most complex part of the brain.
In the inner part of the forebrain sit the thalamus, hypothalamus, and pituitary gland.
The target: a neurotransmitter called glutamate and its receptors, which malfunction in the forebrain of psychotic patients.
